title: Winter Star-Light
lyrics:
Clock struck two. 지금 is the only time we own.
Streetlights are dead. 눈꽃처럼 alone, yeah.
Forget the eggnog. 다 잊자, our heat is on fire.
나쁜 목록 is pushing us higher.
Too loud for silence, too fast for the slow burn.
This kind of miracle is a lesson you gotta learn.
I'm ready for the 밤.
You're my Winter Star-Light, shining for me,
This feeling is the magic that breaks the Alarm.
On December 25, when the stars align,
We cross the line, yeah, you're the greatest present I could find.
Oh-oh-oh, Winter Star-Light, yeah, tell 'em that it's mine.

Feel. The. Rush. / Feel. The. Rush.
잠이 든 세상 is just white noise.
이거 Silent Night 아니야. Siren call, yeah.
Icy exterior, focus is a hot wire.
나뿐이야. No need for a drop-top.
넌 내 궤도 안. Yeah, check the gravity.
멈출 수 없어. Don't try to challenge me.
My only resolution is to take control,
이 선물은 너야. I'm reaching for the goal.

The snow keeps falling, but I can't feel the cold now.
They told us to wait, to be perfect, to follow the vow.
This feeling is 사랑. It's too Strong.
I don't care about tomorrow...
Just this one midnight miracle, while no one else can hear.
...BREAKING ALL THE RULES FOR YOU!
NOW THE MIRACLE IS REAL!
You're my Winter Star-Light, shining for me,
This feeling is the magic that breaks the Alarm.
On December 25, when the stars align,
We cross the line, yeah, you're the greatest present I could find.
Oh-oh-oh, Winter Star-Light, yeah, tell 'em that it's mine.

Everything is covered in the winter white.
달콤한 느낌, I just can't deny it.
We started this party, and you can't be quiet.
My heart goes boom, ready for the fun, yeah.

We don't need permission, we don't need a vow.
Just this feeling of joy, right before we fly...
Hit the floor with the Snowflake Drop!
This feeling, this rhythm, yeah, it won't ever stop.
가장 빛나는 곳, that's where we'll be.

I want to see your smile in this winter light.
You are my Christmas wish, and my eternal youth.

We don't need permission, we don't need a vow.
가까이 와봐, don't be shy tonight.

기다려 왔어, this feeling is the truth.

title: Midnight Countdown
lyrics:
시간 없어 (No time), can you feel the pulse?
We missed the last train, no time to consult.
지금 바로 달려 (Run right now), the light is turning red.
Forget the fear, just listen to what I said.
The clock is counting, 00:05 left on the meter.

Every second is gold, yeah, we can't afford to stop.
We gotta make this moment count before the final drop.
Can you feel the rhythm? It’s pulling us closer...

Hurry Up! It’s the Midnight Countdown!

Hurry Up! It’s the Midnight Countdown!
Best night of the year when the pressure comes down.
모두 같이 외쳐 (Everyone shout together), there’s no time to waste.
We gotta make it now—gotta get a taste!

I see the finish line, gotta pick up the pace.
멈출 수 없어 (Can't stop), every window is a flash.
We threw out the map—now we run on the crash.
The final seconds, hear the engine scream out loud,
We're the only two people left in this huge crowd.

Hurry Up! This feeling is dangerous.

Don't look at the screen, don't worry about the vow.

The clock is at zero, the pressure is gone!

Best night of the year when the pressure comes down.

title: Box of Us
lyrics:
The chaos is over, the clock finally stopped.
The paper and glitter are cleaned up and dropped.
아침 햇살 (Morning sun) is quiet on the floor.
I don't need the outside noise anymore.

This is the box of us. The wrapping is gone.
You are the secret I've waited on.
내 옆에 있어줘 (Stay by my side). I've got all I need.
Your heart is the only gift I truly heed.

All the fighting and chasing, the urgency, the rush—
Was just to get here, to this moment of hush.
We don't need bright lights, no more flashing signs.
This quiet conviction is the greatest design.

All the lights and the rush—it was just a disguise.
The truth was always right here in your eyes.

title: Retro Holiday '97
lyrics:
The year is '97, the snow is falling, but the mood is hot.
I'm wearing my bright colors, neon lights on the spot.
This Christmas is different, no quiet carols tonight.
We're turning up the bass, shining with all our might.

Do you remember that feeling, the smooth R&B groove?

title: Frozen Christmas
lyrics:
The city lights are blurred through the frozen window pane.
This velvet silence is ringing, washing over me like rain.
The calendar says Christmas, but the air is cold and empty.
Just a heavy bass line echoes the promises you sent me.

Every melody is minor, every note is bittersweet.
I walk the empty streets, retracing our last winter retreat.
The snow is falling now, a cinematic tragedy,
I only feel your ghost here, singing back to me.

This is not a merry christmas, it's a winter blue.
Heavy 808 drops, every sound reminds me of 우리 사랑.
Our hearts are frozen, a beautiful, broken display,
다시 돌아와, just to save this holiday.

I remember the warmth, the perfect harmony we found.
Now the reverb holds my voice, there's no one else around.
I search for a sign, a glimmer in the fading light.
Just one last dramatic kiss to make everything right.

The frost on the glass is thick, just like the silence between us.
I see your shadow in the corner, but I know it's a minus.
How did we lose the rhythm, the beat of our December heart?
I need a signal now, before we completely drift apart.

This is not a merry christmas, it's a winter blue.
Heavy 808 drops, every sound reminds me of 우리 사랑.
Our hearts are frozen, a beautiful, broken display,
다시 돌아와, just to save this holiday.

The strings swell up, a final plea in the air.
I'm caught in this loop, a sadness too heavy to bear.
I close my eyes and wait for the sound of your return.
나의 크리스마스 , please let the fire burn.

Save this night...
Don't let go...

What do you think?

I reach my hand.

title: Hide and Seek
lyrics:
[Intro]
One! Two! Three! Four!
안 훔쳐볼게!
Five! Six! Seven! Eight!
계속 기다려!

[Verse One]
Face to the tree! Eyes closed tight!
벽을 짚고서! 난 착한 아이!
I know the rules! I stay in the light!
끝까지 믿고! 기다릴게!

[Chorus]
HOLD THE BASE! 기다릴게!
HIDE MY FACE! 안 훔쳐봐!
PLAY IT FAIR! 여기 있어!
STAY RIGHT THERE! 널 믿고서!
I'm covering my eyes, I'm playing my part!
두 눈을 꼭 감고, 지키는 내 맘!

[Verse Two]
Numbers go up! You hide so well!
숨바꼭질! 너무 재밌어!
You found a new friend! You ran in the street!
눈을 꾹 감고! Counting the beat!

HIDE MY... HIDE MY FACE! 안 훔쳐봐!
PLAY IT FAIR! 여기 있어!
STAY RIGHT... STAY RIGHT THERE! 널 믿고서!
I'm covering my eyes, I'm playing my... part?
두 눈을 꼭 감고, 지키는 내... 맘?

[Pre-Drop]
[Music glitches, stutters, and grinds to a complete halt. Absolute silence.]
Ten...
I open my eyes, ready to find you.
But you're already standing at the base.
네가 규칙을 바꿨다고 했지.
You gave the star away... because I counted too slow?

[Beat Drop]
[Heavy, slow, deep sub-bass. Minimal instrumentation.]
착한 아이는 집에 갔어.
The eyes are still open.
But they aren't his anymore.

[Emotionless Chorus]
Hold the base. 기다릴게.
Hide my face. 안 훔쳐봐.
Play it fair. 여기 있어.
Stay right there. 널 믿고서.
I'm covering my eyes. I'm playing my part.
두 눈을 꼭 감고. 지키는 내 맘.

[Final Chorus]
Ready or not. 다 끝났어.
Look what I caught. 널 찾았어.
I see you. 다 보여.
Now we're through. 도망쳐봐.
The Good Boy is gone. He's out of the game.
새로운 술래. Nothing's the same.

title: Ping
lyrics:
[Intro]
[Chorus]

High latency rate.
버퍼링 되는 웨이트.
A hanging thread.
로그에 남은 레드.
The packet is dead.
읽히지 않는 헤드.

[Verse 1]

Matching the pace.
설계되어 있는 베이스.
Following the trace.
지워진 데이터 페이스.
Drawing the line.
끊겨버린 통신 사인.
The system is fine.
설계되어 있는 디자인.

[Verse 2]

Null attribute.
모든 입력은 뮤트.
Command: Execute.
어긋나버린 루트.
A localized lie.
식어버린 숲의 아이.
The signal is high.
마지막 단계의 바이.

[Chorus]

버퍼링 되는 웨이트.
A hanging thread.
로그에 남은 레드.
The packet is dead.
읽히지 않는 헤드.

[Verse 3]
The process is done.
여기서 한없이 먼.
The protocol stop.
마지막 데이터 드롭.
The background is static.
나무 아래 스테이틱.
The script is automatic.
단순한 오토매틱.

[Final Chorus]
High latency rate.
버퍼링 되는 웨이트.
A hanging thread.
로그에 남은 레드.
The packet is dead.
읽히지 않는 헤드.

[Outro]
Ping timeout.
Task: Terminated.

title: 砂糖菓子の猟
lyrics:
[Intro]
お手伝いしましょうか？

[Verse 1]
The room is glowing with a sterile light
視界の奥、隠れたサイト
Shadows pool where the silence stays
隠れた甘い、焦げた匂いのヘイズ

[Bridge]
Mountains of skulls and entrails spread
視界の奥は、真っ赤なデッド
Feeding on images inside your head
飲み込んで、すべて無
君の心、消えてく

[Chorus]
Gore, flesh, blood, and slaughter
滅亡の絵と思想、喰らうモンスター
血まみれの道、僕の水
君の鼓動、僕の傷
I must eat the meat, it’s all so delicious
肉の塊、 Mmmmmm... yum!

[Verse 2]
Sink your teeth in, let the spirit break
魂の音、パキリとメイク
The final throbbing chill for the hunger's sake
命が枯れる、完璧なテイク
 獲物の悲鳴、  僕の喜び！

[Bridge]
Mountains of skulls and entrails spread
視界の奥は、真っ赤なデッド
Feeding on images inside your head
飲み込んで、すべて無
君の心、消えてく

[Chorus]
Gore, flesh, blood, and slaughter
滅亡の絵と思想、喰らうモンスター
血まみれの道、僕の水
君の鼓動、僕の傷
I must eat the meat, it’s all so delicious
肉の塊、 Mmmmmm... yum!

[Verse 3]
Inside the black hole where the hunger goes
獲物も知らない、蜜のクローズ
I love the muscle twitch, despair so rich
変わっていく、絶望のピッチ
While you tell me the woes that you wouldn't dare
The scent of your fear is the prize that we share

[Bridge]
Mountains of skulls and entrails spread
視界の奥は、真っ赤なデッド
Feeding on images inside your head
飲み込んで、すべて無

[Chorus]
Gore, flesh, blood, and slaughter
滅亡の絵と思想、喰らうモンスター
血まみれの道、僕の水
君の鼓動、僕の傷
I must eat the meat, it’s all so delicious
肉の塊、 Mmmmmm... yum!

[Outro]
お疲れ様でした。
全て、喰らいつくす。
Mata ne.

title: Sugar
lyrics:
There it is.
対象を確認、気に入った。
The wool is matted, 脂で汚染 
It's time to eat.
摂取を開始する。

Hollowed out this sheep-head, full of rot
A mask to wear, and a carcass I'm not
部屋を見渡せば、ただの肉塊 
静寂に飽きた、始める解体 
It's nothing to gain, just hunger to sate
I'm bored of the silence on the edge of the plate
骨に群がる、甘い腐敗 
玉座に座るは、俺の次第

INTAKE! Standard procedure. Swallow the stain!
INTAKE! 定常タスク、extracting the brain!
INTAKE! There is no exception, the target is meat!
INTAKE! 必然の消費、I always eat!
INTAKE! 終わらないループ、the cycle repeats!
INTAKE! ノイズの消去、I empty the seats!
INTAKE! 骨を粉砕。The system is fed!
INTAKE! 定期実行、another one dead!

All the pieces of meat, leaking its slop
解体プロセス、I won't ever stop 
Chewing on your thoughts and what gives you fear
これが唯一の論理、that's why I'm here 
No words anymore, just a blank stare
俺の空洞を埋める、with death and despair 
要求された絶望を、出力する 
You're safe inside the maw, you're such a great snack
Snap the bone. 粉砕する、hear it crack

INTAKE! Forced execution. Swallow the stain!
INTAKE! 強制タスク、extracting the brain!
INTAKE! There is no exception, I fracture the meat!
INTAKE! 暴力の消費、I always eat!
INTAKE! 容赦ないループ、the cycle repeats!
INTAKE! ノイズの破壊、I empty the seats!
INTAKE! 骨を粉砕！The system is fed!
INTAKE! 強制排除、another one dead!

Wiping off the blood, the matter and your state
糞袋の残骸、accept your fate 
I wear the rot, the carcass that isn't mine
ただの偽装、a perfect design 
脳漿を摂取。
完全なる吸収。
The noise did stop
After eating brain-slop
剥がす。奪う。中に入れる。

INTAKE! TOTAL OBLITERATION. SWALLOW THE STAIN!
INTAKE! 抹殺タスク、EXTRACTING THE BRAIN!
INTAKE! THERE IS NO EXCEPTION, I PULVERIZE MEAT!
INTAKE! 絶対の捕食、I ALWAYS EAT!
INTAKE! 壊滅のループ、THE CYCLE REPEATS!
INTAKE! ノイズの殲滅、I EMPTY THE SEATS!
INTAKE! 骨を粉砕！THE SYSTEM IS FED!
INTAKE! 完全排除！ANOTHER ONE DEAD!

INTAKE! The internal tank is full! The friction is gone!

0-x-0.
Next target.
Now.
INTAKE!

美味。(Delicious.)
